homepage.title: Hungarian Water Partnership
homepage.text_excerpt:
Hungarian Water Partnership
LINKING PARTNERS WHO RESPECT WATER
Talk to us if you work in water purification, wastewater treatment or water management.
We are a registered industrial cluster. Our Hungarian-owned member companies offer innovative, sustainable, and cost-efficient solutions across the globe. Among our members are a national research institute and a university too — both open to R&D collaboration.
We’re proud to represent our members internationally and glad to serve as your first point of contact with them.
AfWASA's Benchmarking Visit
Budapest, Hungary
24-28 February 2026
The Future of Water Conference
Budapest, Hungary
27 February 2026

Latest News
Oliver Nachevski Awarded Honorary Ambassador Title by the Hungarian Water Partnership
On 27 February 2026, the Hungarian Water Partnership (HWP) awarded the prestigious title of Honorary Ambassador to Mr. Oliver Nachevski, recognizing his outstanding contributions to strengthening the international reputation of the Hungarian water industry and promoting global professional cooperation in the water sector.
Hungarian Water Partnership and PASA Sign Strategic Cooperation Agreement on Sustainable Sanitation In Africa
On the 27th of February, the
Hungarian Water Partnership (HWP)
and the
Pan-African Association of Sanitation Actors
(PASA)
signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) establishing a framework for cooperation for the joint development of an ecosystem and value chain for non-sewered sanitation, faecal sludge treatment and resource valorisation.
The Future of Water – Global Challenges, Innovative Solutions
300+ participants, 20+ countries, one shared goal: the future of water security
Leading water sector stakeholders from Africa, Europe, and Asia gathered in Hungary for the international conference
“The Future of Water”
, organized by the
Hungarian Water Partnership
within the framework of
Planet Budapest 2026
No Boarding Pass Needed to Africa - Global Water and Sanitation Connect 2026
A high-level African water and sanitation industry delegation of 50 welcomed in Budapest
At the invitation of the
Hungarian Water Partnership (HWP)
, 50 senior water sector leaders, technical directors, and policy decision-makers from over 15 African countries vi

LINKING PARTNERS WHO RESPECT WATER
Talk to us if you work in water purification, wastewater treatment or water management.
We are a registered industrial cluster. Our Hungarian-owned member companies offer innovative, sustainable, and cost-efficient solutions across the globe. Among our members are a national research institute and a university too — both open to R&D collaboration.
We’re proud to represent our members internationally and glad to serve as your first point of contact with them.

Latest News
Oliver Nachevski Awarded Honorary Ambassador Title by the Hungarian Water Partnership
On 27 February 2026, the Hungarian Water Partnership (HWP) awarded the prestigious title of Honorary Ambassador to Mr. Oliver Nachevski, recognizing his outstanding contributions to strengthening the international reputation of the Hungarian water industry and promoting global professional cooperation in the water sector.
Hungarian Water Partnership and PASA Sign Strategic Cooperation Agreement on Sustainable Sanitation In Africa
On the 27th of February, the
Hungarian Water Partnership (HWP)
and the
Pan-African Association of Sanitation Actors
(PASA)
signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) establishing a framework for cooperation for the joint development of an ecosystem and value chain for non-sewered sanitation, faecal sludge treatment and resource valorisation.
The Future of Water – Global Challenges, Innovative Solutions
300+ participants, 20+ countries, one shared goal: the future of water security
Leading water sector stakeholders from Africa, Europe, and Asia gathered in Hungary for the international conference
“The Future of Water”
, organized by the
Hungarian Water Partnership
within the framework of
Planet Budapest 2026
No Boarding Pass Needed to Africa - Global Water and Sanitation Connect 2026
A high-level African water and sanitation industry delegation of 50 welcomed in Budapest
At the invitation of the
Hungarian Water Partnership (HWP)
, 50 senior water sector leaders, technical directors, and policy decision-makers from over 15 African countries visited Budapest between February 24–28, 2026, to learn about Hungary’s internationally recognized water technologies and cooperation models.
Hungarian Water Partnership and Hanoi University of Civil Engineering Mark a New Milestone in Hungarian–Vietnamese Water Cooperation
28 January 2026
, the
Hungarian Water Partnership
(HWP)
and the
Hanoi University of Civil Engineering
(HUCE)
signed a
Memorandum of Understanding (MOU)
, opening new horizons for cooperation in sustainable water management, education, research, and joint professional initiatives.
The agreement represents a significant milestone in the strengthening of Hungarian–Vietnamese relations in the water and environmental sectors and reflects the shared ambition of both parties to translate academic excellence and technological expertise into practical, future-oriented solutions.
